speaker: UNKNOWN
text: Take, O take those lips away,

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: That so sweetly were forsworn,

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: And those eyes, the break of day,

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: Lights that do mislead the morn.

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: But my kisses bring again, bring again,

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: Seals of love, but sealed in vain, sealed in vain.

speaker: MARIANA
text: Break off thy song and haste thee quick away.

speaker: MARIANA
text: Here comes a man of comfort, whose advice

speaker: MARIANA
text: Hath often stilled my brawling discontent.

speaker: MARIANA
text: I cry you mercy, sir, and well could wish

speaker: MARIANA
text: You had not found me here so musical.

speaker: MARIANA
text: Let me excuse me, and believe me so,

speaker: MARIANA
text: My mirth it much displeased, but pleased my woe.

speaker: DUKE
text: ’Tis good, though music oft hath such a charm

speaker: DUKE
text: To make bad good and good provoke to harm.

speaker: DUKE
text: I pray you tell me, hath anybody inquired for me

speaker: DUKE
text: here today? Much upon this time have I promised

speaker: DUKE
text: here to meet.

speaker: MARIANA
text: You have not been inquired after. I have sat

speaker: MARIANA
text: here all day.

speaker: DUKE
text: I do constantly believe you. The time is

speaker: DUKE
text: come even now. I shall crave your forbearance a

speaker: DUKE
text: little. Maybe I will call upon you anon for some

speaker: DUKE
text: advantage to yourself.

speaker: MARIANA
text: I am always bound to you.

speaker: DUKE
text: Very well met, and welcome.

speaker: DUKE
text: What is the news from this good deputy?

speaker: ISABELLA
text: He hath a garden circummured with brick,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: Whose western side is with a vineyard backed;

speaker: ISABELLA
text: And to that vineyard is a planchèd gate

speaker: ISABELLA
text: That makes his opening with this bigger key.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: This other doth command a little door

speaker: ISABELLA
text: Which from the vineyard to the garden leads.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: There have I made my promise, upon the

speaker: ISABELLA
text: Heavy middle of the night, to call upon him.

speaker: DUKE
text: But shall you on your knowledge find this way?

speaker: ISABELLA
text: I have ta’en a due and wary note upon ’t.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: With whispering and most guilty diligence,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: In action all of precept, he did show me

speaker: ISABELLA
text: The way twice o’er.

speaker: DUKE
text: Are there no other tokens

speaker: DUKE
text: Between you ’greed concerning her observance?

speaker: ISABELLA
text: No, none, but only a repair i’ th’ dark,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: And that I have possessed him my most stay

speaker: ISABELLA
text: Can be but brief, for I have made him know

speaker: ISABELLA
text: I have a servant comes with me along

speaker: ISABELLA
text: That stays upon me, whose persuasion is

speaker: ISABELLA
text: I come about my brother.

speaker: DUKE
text: ’Tis well borne up.

speaker: DUKE
text: I have not yet made known to Mariana

speaker: DUKE
text: A word of this.—What ho, within; come forth.

speaker: DUKE
text:
To
                 
                Mariana
                .
                 
              I pray you be acquainted with this maid.

speaker: DUKE
text: She comes to do you good.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: I do desire the like.

speaker: DUKE
text: Do you persuade yourself that I respect you?

speaker: MARIANA
text: Good friar, I know you do, and have found it.

speaker: DUKE
text: Take then this your companion by the hand,

speaker: DUKE
text: Who hath a story ready for your ear.

speaker: DUKE
text: I shall attend your leisure. But make haste.

speaker: DUKE
text: The vaporous night approaches.

speaker: MARIANA
text: Will ’t please you walk aside?

speaker: DUKE
text: O place and greatness, millions of false eyes

speaker: DUKE
text: Are stuck upon thee; volumes of report

speaker: DUKE
text: Run with these false, and, most contrarious, quest

speaker: DUKE
text: Upon thy doings; thousand escapes of wit

speaker: DUKE
text: Make thee the father of their idle dream

speaker: DUKE
text: And rack thee in their fancies.

speaker: DUKE
text: Welcome. How agreed?

speaker: ISABELLA
text: She’ll take the enterprise upon her, father,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: If you advise it.

speaker: DUKE
text: It is not my consent

speaker: DUKE
text: But my entreaty too.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: Little have you to say

speaker: ISABELLA
text: When you depart from him, but, soft and low,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: “Remember now my brother.”

speaker: MARIANA
text: Fear me not.

speaker: DUKE
text: Nor, gentle daughter, fear you not at all.

speaker: DUKE
text: He is your husband on a precontract.

speaker: DUKE
text: To bring you thus together ’tis no sin,

speaker: DUKE
text: Sith that the justice of your title to him

speaker: DUKE
text: Doth flourish the deceit. Come, let us go.

speaker: DUKE
text: Our corn’s to reap, for yet our tithe’s to sow.
